projectDescription: A REST API for tracking League of Legends player statistics, ranks, and match history using the Riot Games API
keyFeatures: Fetch player profile data including rank, level, and profile icon
Retrieve ranked Solo/Duo statistics with LP and winrate calculation
Query paginated match history with detailed game information
Access complete match details with all 10 players, KDA, items, and team scores
Support for multiple queue types including Ranked, Normal, ARAM, and Clash
publicApiSurface: GET /api/jugador/:nombre/:tag - Fetch player profile and ranked statistics
